privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for splunk_env data_exfiltration_monitor task by verifying that the data source is the official Splunk tutorial dataset (synthetic Buttercup Games data) downloaded from docs.splunk.com and ingested into the 'tutorial' index. The expected report name 'High_Volume_Data_Transfers', alert name 'Exfiltration_Spike_Alert', and dashboard name 'Data_Exfiltration_Dashboard' explicitly match the task description instructions and export script API checks. The Splunk credentials ('admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!') are explicitly confirmed in the environment's installation scripts.
